attacks.finding: Controlled by top mechanism and candidate caps.
Controlled by capping activation mechanisms at 6 and ranked candidates at 5.
Partially rejected by traceable activation lineages on every ranked pathway.
Survives. Interaction ranking is deterministic over activation weights and motif overlap.
Metrics use expected labels only after interaction candidates and delayed ranking are generated.

invalidated_claims: Delayed ranking is independent of deterministic interaction scoring.
All generated pathways are valid recombinations.
Expected mechanism labels were used during interaction generation.
surviving_claims: Activation capture used pond-backed consults before interaction and delayed ranking.
Delayed ranking improved top-pathway valid candidate rate over immediate winner-take-all recall.
Delayed ranking preserved deeper mechanism combinations than immediate ranking.
